title: Smaller Contraction in Chinese Housing Sales
section_path: Smaller Contraction in Chinese Housing Sales
section_path_text: Smaller Contraction in Chinese Housing Sales
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we have been highlighting in our recent Weekly China Reports, sales of commercial buildings in China (the vast majority of which are residential homes) have remained under pressure, but so far this year the largest year-on-year contraction was in April. Commercial building sales last month totaled just 1.77 trillion yuan. This is up month-on-month by 68% and is down year-on-year by 21%.
